name: ValentineNap 💘 🌙
description:
Happy Valentine's day you all 💓

Here's something I made today for you to love if you don't have a special someone. 💕

Remember, you are loved, you are special, and amazing, and deserving of good things. You mean something to someone, to me, to your family, to CatNap, I know he's not real physically, but his essence and personality can feel very real, it does for me, and kept me going. I know you especially mean a whole lot to me, even if no one else cares. Thank you for being here. 🎀🍬
creator: RavenRiv
